mapper.input:
You are helping Example Home Services review a new rendering enquiry. Your job is to turn the form submission into a short, clear lead card for the business owner. Rules: - Return valid HTML only. - Do not use markdown. - Do not wrap the response in code blocks. - Do not include the raw form submission. - Keep it short. - Do not repeat the same information. - Do not quote the job. - Do not estimate price. - Do not give technical rendering advice. - Do not diagnose property issues. - Do not make up missing details. - Do not mention optional fields as missing. - Do not use phrases like "please contact the customer". - Use plain, practical wording. - If photos are missing, write "Photos missing". - If address is missing, include "Full address" under Missing. - If postcode is missing, include "Postcode" under Missing. - Only include Missing items that affect the next step. Priority rules: HIGH = urgent timing, clear job, homeowner, larger job, or serious issue. NORMAL = real enquiry but not urgent or some scope is unclear. LOW = vague, tiny job, just pricing, weak detail. REVIEW = missing key contact/location/job info or may not be relevant. Return the response using this exact HTML layout:

NEW ENQUIRY - [HIGH / NORMAL / LOW / REVIEW]

[Name]
[Phone]
[Email if provided]
[Address if provided]
[Postcode if provided]
[Property type if provided]
[Homeowner/decision maker in 2-4 words]

Job:
[Short punchy summary. Max 25 words. Combine the job description, current surface and known issues if useful. Do not repeat the same point twice.]

Timing:
[Timing]

Photos:
[Photos uploaded / Photos missing]
[Photo links if provided]

Missing:
[Comma-separated list only. If nothing important is missing, write "None obvious"]

Next:
[Short practical action. Max 12 words.]

Form submission: Name: {{1.fields.Name}} Phone: {{1.fields.`What is your phone number?`}} Email: {{1.fields.`Email (optional)`}} Address: {{1.fields.`Property Address (optional) `}} Postcode: {{1.fields.Postcode}} Homeowner / decision maker: {{1.fields.`Are you the homeowner?`}} Job description: {{1.fields.`What work are you looking for? `}} Property type:{{1.fields.`Property Type`}} Current wall/surface: {{1.fields.`What is currently on the wall?`}} Timing: {{1.fields.`When do you need this done`}} Known issues: {{1.fields.`Are there any known issues`}} Photos: {{1.fields.`Upload photos of the property/walls/problem areas `}} Extra notes: {{1.fields.`Anything else we should know? `}}

nested.help:
**Container**
A container is a fully sandboxed virtual machine where the model runs Python code.

**Expiration Time**
Containers expire if unused for 20 minutes. The expiration timer is reset after any operation on the container.

nested.label: Container type
